name: upriv-dev
description: Upriv dev scripts only — install deps in apps/desktop, apps/electron, and apps/mobile separately

scripts.build: node scripts/sync-version.mjs && npm run build --prefix apps/desktop
scripts.rust:lint: npm run rust:fmt:check && npm run rust:clippy
scripts.electron:dev: npm run daemon:build && npm run dev --prefix apps/electron
scripts.electron:build: node scripts/sync-version.mjs && npm run build:electron --prefix apps/desktop && npm run daemon:build:release && npm run dist:linux --prefix apps/electron
scripts.electron:build:win: node scripts/sync-version.mjs && npm run build:electron --prefix apps/desktop && npm run daemon:build:release && npm run dist:win --prefix apps/electron
